description: HydrateOperation contains information about the most recent hydrate operation

drySHA.description: DrySHA holds the resolved revision (sha) of the dry source as of the most recent reconciliation

finishedAt.description: FinishedAt indicates when the hydrate operation finished

hydratedSHA.description: HydratedSHA holds the resolved revision (sha) of the hydrated source as of the most recent reconciliation

message.description: Message contains a message describing the current status of the hydrate operation

phase.description: Phase indicates the status of the hydrate operation

sourceHydrator.description: SourceHydrator holds the hydrator config used for the hydrate operation

startedAt.description: StartedAt indicates when the hydrate operation started
